no_changes_rationale:
Done: The four MCP metrics tools requested by this bead already exist in the
codebase at base-rev 4b6851fe and require no further code changes:

  - ddx_metrics_summary    — registered cli/internal/server/server.go:3291-3301,
                             dispatched :3626-3628, implemented mcpMetricsSummary
                             at :4665.
  - ddx_metrics_cost       — registered :3302-3314, dispatched :3629-3633,
                             implemented mcpMetricsCost (with bead/feature
                             filters) at :~4682.
  - ddx_metrics_cycle_time — registered :3315-3325, dispatched :3634-3636,
                             implemented mcpMetricsCycleTime at :~4696.
  - ddx_metrics_rework     — registered :3326-3336, dispatched :3637-3639,
                             implemented mcpMetricsRework at :~4710.

All four mirror the corresponding HTTP endpoints (handleMetrics{Summary,Cost,
CycleTime,Rework}) and reuse processmetrics.New(workingDir).{Summary,Cost,
CycleTime,Rework}(query) with the same Query construction (since/bead/feature).
The "since" argument accepts the same forms as the HTTP layer via
processmetrics.ParseSince.

Verification: `git show 4b6851fe:cli/internal/server/server.go | grep` confirms
the tool registrations, dispatch cases, and implementation functions are all
present at the base revision. The originating commit is bfca57d3
("feat(mcp): add ddx_metrics_summary/cost/cycle_time/rework MCP tools
[.execute-bead-wt-ddx-44236615-20260429T185004-ffa9adf1-88c136e6]") — i.e. an
earlier successful execution of this same bead.

Blocking: None — the work is complete. The prior review's BLOCK note
("Diff only contains execution evidence files... No actual MCP tool
implementation is present in the changed files") appears to have been
written against an empty execution worktree from a separate iteration; the
actual implementation has been merged to the base branch.

Follow-up needed: None for the bead's acceptance. The bead can be closed.
